feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,898Chapters: 4/39Kudos: 55

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!

entry.title: The Ring Between Darkness and Light
entry.summary:
Author: ShiningChimp

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,122Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Two masked legends rise from opposite worlds: Bruce Wayne, the brooding heir who forged himself into El Murciélago under the weight of grief, and Clark Kent, the bright‑hearted farm boy who becomes El Hombre de Acero with nothing but hope and raw strength. In the electrifying world of lucha libre, their rivalry becomes the stuff of myth—shadow against sunlight, precision against power. But beneath every clash, every stare, every brush of bodies in the ring, something deeper sparks. Neither man expects it. Neither man can stop it. And the fight that will define them is the one they never saw coming: falling in love.

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,094Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 112

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,232Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 141

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,734Chapters: 4/14Kudos: 2

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: Kryptonian Reproduction, an Observation
entry.summary:
Author: Winkaku

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,170Chapters: 27/27Kudos: 1,594

Summary: They'd been caught in each others orbit for some time now and, quite frankly, Clark should have seen this coming. Crazy was part and parcel to Gotham after all... let alone his own life. His father had warned him about mad scientists, but Clark had the distinct feeling that this was not what he'd envisioned in the slightest.A series of PWP vignettes wherein the plot is entirely background.AKA: that time I tried to make a kinky science fic that turned into a writing challenge that turned into a crazy romp with associated art pieces. Fun was had by all.

entry.title: bats on film
entry.summary:
Author: outboard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,467Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 66

Summary: "Bruce, your neck," Georgia stressed, her face slightly flushed. With a frown, Bruce tucked his chin, bringing a hand up to feel along his neck. Everything felt normal, his nerves responding to his touch, nothing too warm or too cold—all the same as it had been earlier this morning. Bruce's thumb caught the edge of a hickey on his collarbone. Oh, shit.The morning after a night spent with Clark, Bruce has to do an underwear photoshoot. What he doesn't expect is for people to start guessing who exactly gave him all those bruises. (He'll just have to set the record straight.)

entry.title: All My Traitor Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,476Chapters: 33/33Kudos: 13

Summary: Gotham, 1935. Bruce Malone is a private investigator with a shingle, a past he doesn't advertise, and a client who smells like jasmine and trouble in equal measure. Diana Prinkipas needs a treasure found. Clark Kent needs a job. Bruce needs to stop noticing things he has no business noticing. Nobody gets what they need. A noir in sixteen movements, one interrogation tape, and a coat button that costs twenty years.

entry.title: The Seats of Stars
entry.summary:
Author: JUBE514

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,227Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 1,440

Summary: Kon-el's entry into the Royal Family is an upset. He changes the hierarchy and whispers that he could assassination the Crown Prince Jon roam the castle halls.Kon's also 13 and desperately trying to find his place in the viperous world of the royal court. He's hoping that training a taur, a wild and whipsmart colt from the Drake stables, will be just the thing to show everyone he's someone to be taken seriously.But taurs are not easy creatures to handle. They are strong and smart and not willing to be led by the weak-willed. His father Kal-El might have the strongest bond in the kingdom with his taur, Bruce, but that's no guarantee Kon will too.-----Tim has been brought to a strange place.He's been taken from the place he lived and told that he was to be the seat of a little prince. They put him in reins and saddles and expected him to bow down. He will not bow down. But also... he doesn't know what to do. His herd is gone. His mother is gone. He's alone. Except for the other taurs, the two brothers, Dick and Jason, and the frightening huge, Bruce. They offer him a family but... is this all a trick for his obedience?

entry.title: Ever Slightly Out of Reach
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,628Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Three years after Superman died in neural drift, the UN Pan-Pacific Defense Committee has finally found language cowardly enough to say what they've always meant: loving Clark Kent makes Bruce Wayne unfit for duty. They think they can regulate grief away through proper documentation. They think love is a security risk that can be managed through committee oversight. They think the strongest drift came from discipline rather than devotion. Bruce Wayne is about to make their institutional cowardice very, very expensive.

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: TheCrimsonCritic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,637Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 49

Summary: "As if the man could sense Bruce’s ogling, Clark looked directly at him as the bull jerked particularly hard, sending the reporter’s back into a sinuous arch. Bruce was a man who had a turbulent “relationship” with Clark, but he was still just a man. A man who wanted the reporter-turned-mechanical-bull rider. Bad." OR Bruce sees Clark ride a mechanical bull at a themed gala wants Clark's cookie BAD. Before AND after discovering Clark's identity as Superman.

entry.title: Nowhere to Land
entry.summary:
Author: bloodvvitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,452Chapters: 12/25Kudos: 251

Summary: Bruce – recently injured and working a case that just won’t break – sees the tactical advantages of temporarily ‘dating’ Superman. Clark – who was almost too late to save his friend from a fatal fall – doesn’t understand what he’s signed up for. For two people who know each other so well, the World’s Finest just can’t manage to get on the same page.

entry.title: Breaking Down Barriers
entry.summary:
Author: Dracula4life

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,381Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: Bruce Wayne has a date with Clark Kent. He tries not to freak out. And if he wants things to go right, he's going to have to set Brucie aside for the night."'Ah, well.' Bruce said, tone smooth and flowing. It was the voice he used when talking to ladies at galas. It was the voice he used to seduce business scandals out of the elite. 'You know, I hear that sort of thing every day, but I’m grateful all the same.'Clark blinked in surprise. That’s when Bruce realized he’d fucked up."

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,679Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 387

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Retrograde
entry.summary:
Author: daisy_marie_1645

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,418Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 515

Summary: “B?”Bruce turned around slowly. Tim knew something was very, very, wrong before Bruce even said anything. He was too tense, and his hair was different. It was greyer, and he had an ever so slightly smaller frame. That and he was looking at Tim in a way he never had before.“Who the hell are you?” Bruce asked.This wasn’t his Bruce.He might have accidentally sent his Bruce across universes.~~~When Tim accidentally hits Bruce with his quantum displacer, he and his brothers are left with an emotionally constipated Bruce that has a very different home life than their own.When Bruce arrives in an alternate universe, he quickly finds out that this universes Bruce is nothing like him.They each leave their mark while trying to get home.

entry.title: for lovers who hesitate
entry.summary:
Author: aikane

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,941Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 66

Summary: This is not how Jason had expected to spend his holidays. He’d been looking forward to testing out his and Dick’s new kitchen, watching classic movie reruns, and cuddling on the couch. And maybe a bit more, if he’s lucky. He was not expecting to play matchmaker for his Dad and the hunky alien.(No seriously how did he get roped into this?)

entry.title: pious bird
entry.summary:
Author: tonguesofliars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,568Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 330

Summary: “He does not remember who you are to him,” Diana says, low and solemn. “I don’t believe I need to tell you what the mirror took. He may remember me and the others, but not with clarity. If I had to assume, his memory stops somewhere before that fateful day at the Harbor.” Bruce loses the memories of their marriage.

entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,321Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 66

Summary: On a cruise ship, Clark Kent's Kryptonian biology recognizes something in Bruce Wayne that even Bruce doesn't see: kor'va—soul recognition. The moment one consciousness knows another will change everything. Three years later, they undergo ra'sh'mora, the ancient Kryptonian bonding ritual. It's not marriage. It's a permanent quantum entanglement of two nervous systems. Clark feels Bruce constantly—his heartbeat, his emotions, his presence. They are never alone again. Then Bruce's heart starts failing.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: i got issues (i can't help it baby)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,354Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 153

Summary: “Mm, well, rumor has it that you’ve had your heart stolen.” Clark swallows hard. “What rumors? Because you and I both know the tabloids will make up that they have a source.” Dent laughs. Clark grits his teeth. “So, is it not true then?” “Why do you ask?” “Because if it’s not true, then I’d like to ask you to dinner.” Clark’s heart stops. ------------------------- After being forced to cover a gala where several of Bruce's ex-flings are also in attendance, Clark makes some discoveries about Kryptonian biology.
